title: Flex Items
content:
### Flex Items

Properties that apply to **children** of a flex container.

---

### Item Properties

| Property | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `flex` | Shorthand for grow, shrink, basis |
| `flex-grow` | How much to grow relative to siblings |
| `flex-shrink` | How much to shrink when space is tight |
| `flex-basis` | Initial size before growing/shrinking |
| `align-self` | Override `align-items` for this item |
| `order` | Reorder items (default 0) |

---

### Flex Grow

```css
.item {
  flex-grow: 0;  /* Default - won't grow */
  flex-grow: 1;  /* Takes remaining space */
  flex-grow: 2;  /* Takes twice the space */
}
```

Items with `flex-grow: 1` share remaining space equally.

---

### Flex Shrink

```css
.item {
  flex-shrink: 1;  /* Default - can shrink */
  flex-shrink: 0;  /* Won't shrink */
}
```

---

### Flex Basis

```css
.item {
  flex-basis: 200px;  /* Starting size */
  flex-basis: 50%;    /* Percentage */
  flex-basis: auto;   /* Default - based on content */
}
```

---

### Flex Shorthand

```css
/* grow shrink basis */
flex: 1;              /* flex: 1 1 0% */
flex: none;           /* flex: 0 0 auto */
flex: 0 0 200px;      /* Fixed 200px */
flex: 1 1 300px;      /* Grow, shrink, start at 300px */
flex: 0 1 auto;       /* Default */
```

---

### Align Self

```css
.container {
  align-items: flex-start; /* All items at top */
}

.item-special {
  align-self: center; /* This one in middle */
}
```

Overrides the container's `align-items`.

---

### Order

```css
.item:nth-child(1) { order: 3; }
.item:nth-child(2) { order: 1; } /* First visually */
.item:nth-child(3) { order: 2; }
```

Does not affect DOM order, only visual order.

> **Best Practice:** Use `flex: 1` for equal-width items. Use `flex: none` for fixed-size items.
codeExample:
flex: 1
flex: 2
flex: 0 0 150px
align-self: center
